asn.description: Autonomous system of the indicator (AS number, ISP, org) — IP indicators.

description.description: Human-readable RST Cloud description of the indicator.

dns.description: DNS resolution summary (A / CNAME / alias) — domain indicators.

false-positive.description: RST Cloud false-positive alarm flag (true / possible / false) and optional note.

filename.description: Filename associated with the file hash — hash indicators.

first-seen.description: First time RST Cloud observed the indicator.

geo.description: Geolocation of the indicator (country, region, city) — IP indicators.

http-status.description: HTTP status observed for the resolved URL — URL indicators.

last-seen.description: Most recent time RST Cloud observed the indicator.

ref.description: Source report / reference URL backing the RST Cloud verdict.

score-confidence.description: RST context sub-score (0-1); triage signal banded to rstcloud:context-confidence (very-low / low / medium / high / very-high). Reflects corroborating intelligence and threat-type impact.

score-relevance.description: RST frequency sub-score (0-1); triage signal banded to rstcloud:relevance (very-low / low / medium / high / very-high). Active-threat likelihood relative to category and novelty/freshness.

score-total.description: RST Cloud overall confidence score (0-100); base score of the RST decaying models. Computed as 100 * (source-confidence * context-confidence * relevance), each sub-score in [0,1]. Operational bands: <15 very-low, 15-30 low, 30-45 medium, 45-70 high (45+ real-time detection, 50+ blocking), 70+ very-high.

tag.description: RST Cloud descriptive tag for the indicator (e.g. malware, stealer, phishing).

threat.description: Threat attributed to the indicator (malware family, actor, tool, campaign).

ttp.description: Technique / TTP associated with the indicator.

whois.description: Inline WHOIS summary (registrar, registrant, dates, age) — domain indicators.

description: RST Cloud IoC Lookup enrichment: score, attribution and type-specific context (geo/ASN for IPs, DNS/WHOIS for domains, HTTP status for URLs, filenames for hashes) for an indicator looked up in RST Cloud. Reference it to the enriched attribute.
name: rst-ioc
